t_ch: 上学时，总是有人会问我「你尾巴怎么被人点着了」…走在人群里，也像在聚光灯下一样显眼。
t_en: When I was at school, people were always asking why my tail was on fire... Everywhere I went, people would notice.

t_ch: 哟，怪老子咯？当年你要是乖乖地让本大爷吃了，还用得着烦恼成这样？
t_en: Oh, so it's all my fault? If you'd just let me devour you at the start, I could've spared you the trouble!

t_ch: 呜呜，后来…后来进了十王司，大家都怪怪的，我以为自己找到了归宿。但十王司的工作…实在太危险了！成天要和各式各样的妖孽鬼怪、不赦恶徒战斗……
t_en: Th—Then I got into the Ten-Lords Commission. Everyone there is weird, so I thought I'd found somewhere I belonged. But the job... the job is too dangerous! I have to fight demons and ghosts and bad guys every day...

t_ch: 我…我真的不适合干这份工作。要是能活着回去，我还是向十王司递交辞呈吧。
t_en: I... I'm just not cut out for it. If I make it back alive... I'm handing in my resignation.

t_ch: 让怕岁阳的人用岁阳来收服岁阳，怎么想都不对劲…实在抱歉，我帮不上忙。
t_en: Who thought making a heliophobe with a heliobus in her tail hunt heliobi was a good idea... I'm sorry, I've been so useless...

t_ch: 你已经做得很好了，藿藿。
t_en: You're doing very well already, Huohuo.

t_ch: …真、真的吗？
t_en: ...R—Really?

t_ch: 是藿藿留下了纸人，谢谢你。
t_en: You're the one who left the paper dolls for me. Thank you.

t_ch: …能帮到你真是太好了。
t_en: ...I—I'm glad it helped...

t_ch: 听到了吗？别哭了，你有用，你留下的纸人也很有用。
t_en: You hear that? Stop crying. You're useful. And your paper dolls are useful too.

t_ch: 真受不了啊！要是我能重获自由，老子第一时间先吞了浮烟那杂碎，再把你这个成天哭哭啼啼的小怂包啊呜一口也吃了。
t_en: Ugh, I've had enough of this! As soon I swallow that coward Cirrus, I'm gonna devour this little crybaby too!

t_ch: 可惜啊，尾巴大爷今非昔比了。要是咱们还拥有当年的力量，别说突破这「鬼打墙」的迷障幻境…就连把创造它的「恚炎」一口吞了也不在话下。
t_en: What a pity that "Mr. Tail" is nothing like he used to be. If we still had our old power, we could forget about this maze and devour its creator, Furynox.

t_ch: 当年的力量？
t_en: Your old power?

t_ch: 尾巴大爷，她对你的来历一无所知呢…小妹妹，岁阳本该寻人类聚集的地方盘踞，眼下却要在这荒无人烟的绥园里聚首，你知道是为何吗？
t_en: Well, "Mr. Tail," seems she knows nothing about your past... Little missy, do you know why the heliobi are gathered in this abandoned garden instead of seizing human habitations?

t_ch: …团建吗？
t_en: ...Team-building?

t_ch: 因为在一千多年以前，这片绥园曾是大岁阳「燎原」与罗浮某位将军激斗的战场！
t_en: Because over a thousand years ago, this very garden was the site of an epic battle between the general of the Luofu and the great heliobus Ignamar.

t_ch: 洪炉破碎，岁阳出逃。曾经构成「燎原」的岁阳碎片们，全都是为了与将军再次交手的夙愿归来。
t_en: Now that the furnace is broken and the heliobi have escaped, fragments like us, who once constituted Ignamar the whole, have returned here — with the desire to challenge the general again.

t_ch: 说起当年那场大战，可谓是惊天地，泣鬼神！燎原幻化无穷，水淹火灼，山崩雷劈，与那位将军斗到难分难解，五五对开！
t_en: The battle between the general and Ignamar was an earth-shaking contest of devastating proportions! Ignamar underwent countless transformations, causing floods, fires, and thunderous landslides... They were locked in a standoff — an evenly matched fight!

t_ch: 真的…五五开吗？
t_en: Evenly matched... Really?

t_ch: 真的是五五开吗？
t_en: Evenly matched... Really?

t_ch: 绝对！
t_en: Of course!

t_ch: 景元还有这段过去？
t_en: I didn't know Jing Yuan had such a history.

t_ch: 那位代表罗浮出战岁阳的将军名唤「腾骁」。
t_en: The general who fought for the Luofu against the heliobus was named "Teng Xiao."

t_ch: 根据十王司的记录，燎原应该是…惨败于那位名叫腾骁的将军手下？
t_en: ...The Ten-Lords Commission records say that Ignamar was soundly defeated by General Teng Xiao...

t_ch: 人类的记载中，当然只会吹嘘将军的战功了！
t_en: Of course the human records would flatter their general!

t_ch: 可惜呀，大岁阳燎原虽然吸收了无数岁阳同胞的力量，却还是低估了人类的奸诈，惜败于那位将军。
t_en: The great Ignamar absorbed the power of countless fellow heliobi, but ultimately underestimated human deceit... They were narrowly defeated by the general.

t_ch: 决战之后，燎原再也不能融聚成形，散成不同的「分灵碎片」，被封进了造化洪炉之中。
t_en: We heliobi could never condense into physical form after that battle. We scattered into fragments and were sealed into the Creation Furnace...

t_ch: 不过，凡事总有例外。我本以为尾巴大爷你逃出生天，逍遥自在去了…却没想到，你竟然被这个小小的狐狸姑娘给制伏了，真是笑死人了。
t_en: ...but there's an exception to everything. "Mr. Tail," I thought you'd escaped to freedom... Who could've guessed you'd be sealed in this tiny foxian girl? Humiliating...

t_ch: 制伏个屁！老子虎落平阳，遇上了这只小狐狸，真是倒了血霉！
t_en: Sealed my foot! My power was weak when I ran into this fox child. It was bad luck, nothing more!

t_ch: 我还小的时候，曾在罗浮的某个角落里看到了奄奄一息的一团火……
t_en: When I was littler, I saw a ball of fire that looked like it was about to turn to embers...

t_ch: 我一时心软，就把它放到了我的尾巴上…结果…结果没想到尾巴大爷竟然想吃掉我！得亏判官们及时出现，我才逃过了一劫。
t_en: I felt sorry for it, so I picked it up and put it on my tail... and then... Mr. Tail tried to eat me! If the judges hadn't arrived, it would've been over...

t_ch: 不过是一口塞不满牙缝的小点心，说吃掉也显得太用力过猛了吧？
t_en: Bah, I did no such thing — you're barely big enough to be an appetizer.

t_ch: 我…我这些年后悔时抹下的眼泪，一定是当年做决定时脑子里进的水…
t_en: All the pain I've suffered since I met you must be retribution for my stupidity back then...

t_ch: 真有趣啊。可惜尾巴大爷没能得逞，不然借着这小姑娘的身体，它说不定能东山再起，像「燎原」那般，把仙舟闹个地覆天翻呢！
t_en: Hilarious! It's a pity "Mr. Tail" didn't devour you... He might've recovered his power and turned the Xianzhou upside down... just like Ignamar did!

t_ch: 为什么岁阳要挑战将军？
t_en: Why did the heliobi challenge the general?

t_ch: 理由？一定需要什么理由吗？
t_en: Why? Does there have to be a reason?

t_ch: 如果你想要冠冕堂皇的——仙舟将岁阳之祖囚禁在牢笼中，为仙舟提供动力，这理由够不够？想要简单直白的——咱们就是想斗一斗将军，看看仙舟人的斤两。
t_en: The official answer is that the Xianzhou is sealing heliobi in a cage and forcing them to supply energy to the ship... In reality, however, we just want to fight the general... and see what the Xianzhou is truly made of!

t_ch: 你们和仙舟有什么仇怨吗？
t_en: Do you have a grudge against the Xianzhou?

t_ch: 仇怨？真是肤浅。如果非要为我们的行事加上一些动机……
t_en: Grudge? How shallow. If you must know the forces behind our actions...

t_ch: 一点点嫉妒，嫉妒有形之物浓烈的情感；一点点好斗，想看看火焰和血肉孰强孰弱；还有一丝丝渴望，渴望拥有你们的肉身，去吃，去杀，去爱，去恨。
t_en: ...there's a pinch of envy — envy towards the potent emotions you corporeal beings have. Then there's a dash of aggression — the desire to see whether the heliobi or bodies of flesh and blood are stronger. Lastly, there's a drizzle of desire. We desire to possess your physical bodies, so we can eat, kill, love, and hate.

t_ch: 我们岁阳一族本来是无忧无虑的生命，就因为接触了人类才感染上了「人性之病」——都怪人类，拥有如此浓烈的情绪和欲望，害得我们再也回不到过去纯洁无染的心境。
t_en: We heliobi were carefree lifeforms, but were tainted with the illness of humanity once we came into contact with it. It's humanity's fault for having such intense emotions and desires — now, we can never, never return to the purity of our past.

t_ch: 所以，我想要恢复自由！我想重新去到天外，尾巴大爷，你不想和碎片们重聚，也不想做一辈子的尾巴，不如跟我一起回归天外如何？
t_en: I want to be free again! I want to return to the cosmos! Mr. Tail, you don't want to regroup with the fragments, and you don't want to be her tail forever — why don't you return with me to the great beyond?

t_ch: …说的比唱的还好听。
t_en: ...Don't get ahead of yourself, Cirrus.

t_ch: 坏家伙，你休想动什么歪心思。尾巴大爷被十王司判官封印着，是逃不掉的…你也别想溜走。
t_en: That's impossible. Mr. Tail was sealed by the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission. He can't escape... and neither can you...

t_ch: 呜哇啊啊啊啊！那边的门自己打开了。
t_en: Wahhhh! That door just opened on its own!

t_ch: 你们看，门后…有一面镜子。
t_en: Look! Th—There's a mirror behind the door...

t_ch: （被拉进来的时候，好像也有同样的镜子。）
t_en: (Didn't I see a similar mirror when I was dragged in?)

t_ch: 怎么回事…镜子、镜子里好像有声音？
t_en: What's going on...? Th—There's a voice in the mirror?

t_ch: 藿藿，汝在镜中？可算定位到了！
t_en: Huohuo, are you in the mirror? I finally found you!

t_ch: 雪衣大人？！
t_en: Madam Xueyi!?

t_ch: 绥园被一股不知来源的力量吞没了…务必小心！
t_en: Fyxestroll Garden has been enveloped by an unknown power... You must be careful!

t_ch: 我们还没有找到桂乃芬小姐，不知道她到哪里去了……
t_en: We still haven't found Miss Guinaifen... I don't know where she went...

t_ch: 当务之急是先解救汝等脱离迷障。来吧，穿过镜子，到这边来。
t_en: The task at hand is to save you from this illusion. Come. Pass through the mirror and come to our side.

t_ch: 我们…似乎回到了绥园里？
t_en: Are we... back in Fyxestroll Garden?

t_ch: 汝等平安归来，看来十王司今日的运气不算太糟。
t_en: You have returned safely. It seems the Ten-Lords Commission is not down on our luck today.

t_ch: 雪衣大人，你没事真是太好了！
t_en: Madam Xueyi, I'm so happy to see you're alright!

t_ch: 你们这一路没遇到什么特殊情况吧？
t_en: Did you encounter anything strange on your way here?

t_ch: 瞒不住啦，浮烟。
t_en: The game's up, Cirrus.

t_ch: 浮烟，还不快滚出我的身体？
t_en: Cirrus, get out of my body. Now.

t_ch: 我被附身了，救救我！
t_en: I got possessed! Help me!

t_ch: 嘻嘻，真不愧是判官啊，警惕的很哪。
t_en: Hehehe, no wonder she's a judge. Very perceptive...

t_ch: 藿藿向雪衣详细解释了此前的经历……
t_en: Huohuo informs Xueyi of what you have experienced so far...

t_ch: 情况吾已明了，不过眼下暂时不是操心浮烟的时候。绥园已被某个更强大的岁阳拖入了幻境，前去镇伏的冥差们也都已失去音信。
t_en: I understand. This isn't the time to deal with Cirrus. Fyxestroll Garden has been dragged into a powerful illusion by an even mightier heliobus, and the spiritfarers who went to suppress it have lost contact with me.

t_ch: 藿藿，若吾与寒鸦上阵依然无法制住那妖物，对付它的重担就落到汝身上了。
t_en: Huohuo, if both Hanya and I are unable to suppress that demon, then you will have to defeat it.

t_ch: 哎？我…我不行的。我不像两位大人那样有本事…我只会在战斗时躲在一边瑟瑟发抖。
t_en: Huh? I—I won't be able to do it! I'm not as powerful as you two... I always run and hide before a battle...

t_ch: 不要妄自菲薄。岁阳无法占夺由另一只岁阳依附的肉身——这便是汝身为判官的绝对优势。
t_en: Do not underestimate yourself. A heliobus cannot possess a body that is already possessed by another heliobus — such is your absolute advantage as a judge.

t_ch: 我被附身了，这也是我的优势？
t_en: I'm possessed too — do I also get an advantage?

t_ch: 说的不错。不过藿藿饱经训练，论对抗岁阳更有心得。
t_en: Correct. However, Huohuo has had many more years of training and is more experienced in fighting heliobi than you.

t_ch: 所以，汝等能在此时平安归来，十王司的运气不算太糟。
t_en: That is why the Ten-Lords Commission is not down on our luck today. We're lucky that you have all returned at this opportune time.

t_ch: 听懂了吗，怂包？打醒精神，眼前这队十王司的人马里，没一个能强过你！
t_en: You hear that, scaredy-cat? You're the ace of the Ten-Lords Commission.

t_ch: 是啊，再弱小的人也有他的长处。
t_en: Indeed. Even the weakest person has their strengths.

t_ch: 虽然知道{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}是想安慰我…但，这话听着高兴不起来啊。
t_en: I know you're trying to comfort me... but that sounded a little weird.

t_ch: 啰嗦，挑后半段爱听的听就好了！
t_en: You need to start filtering out the stuff you don't wanna hear. That's what I do.

t_ch: 岁阳虽然凶悍，却始终不能摆脱对血肉凡身的渴望。但汝却能时刻降服妖物保持常性，为十王效力三十八载。汝已是一名合格的判官，应当再自信一些。
t_en: The heliobi are aggressive beings, but they cannot shake their desire for a flesh and blood body. And yet, during the <unbreak>38</unbreak> years you have worked for the Ten Lords, you have been constantly able to suppress the monster within your tail and maintain your personality. You are already a fitting judge. Be confident.

t_ch: 吾等判官，谁也无法在这一点上强过你。
t_en: On that point, none of the other judges can surpass you.

t_ch: 降服妖物…我似乎也降不住尾巴啊？我和尾巴，其实算是…朋友？
t_en: Suppress the monster... B—But I don't think I've ever had to suppress Tail! I guess we're more like... friends?

t_ch: 呸呸呸，老子才不和口粮交朋友！
t_en: Friends!? Bah! I don't make friends with food.

t_ch: 嘻嘻，尾巴大爷，像咱们这等小小碎片，早已没有「燎原」的力量了，就算是小姑娘也能轻松制伏，你就别嘴硬了。
t_en: Hehe, "Mr. Tail," puny fragments like us were deprived of Ignamar's power long ago... If a little girl can subdue us, then perhaps it's time for some humility.

t_ch: 你闭嘴！
t_en: Shut your trap!

t_ch: 恚炎固然神通广大，要是能想办法将之分裂为数个碎片，便有希望镇伏。
t_en: Though Furynox is powerful, we have a chance of suppressing them if we can break them into multiple fragments.

t_ch: 判官大人真是打的一手好算盘，既然气氛都烘托到这了，我愿贡献一计。咱们先去个开阔的地方吧…比如那边的燕乐亭。
t_en: You have a sound plan, Your Honor... and since the stage is set, allow me to offer my assistance. Let's find somewhere more open first... like Swallowsong Pavilion, over there.

t_ch: 听听浮烟的计划。
t_en: Let's listen to Cirrus's plan.

t_ch: 走吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 等等，我再仔细考虑一下。
t_en: Wait, let me think about it.

t_ch: 明白了，等汝考虑清楚。
t_en: I understand. Take your time.

t_ch: 浮烟在迷障里帮了我们，说不定…也许…可以暂时相信它？
t_en: Cirrus already helped us in the illusion maze. Maybe... we can trust them for now?

t_ch: 浮烟也许另有目的。
t_en: Cirrus may have ulterior motives.

t_ch: 信不信由你，我只是想离开这里，我能有什么坏心思呢？
t_en: You can believe whatever you like. I just want to get out of here. That's all I want.

t_ch: 你和雪衣大人在，它跑不了。
t_en: Both you and Madam Xueyi are here. They can't escape.

t_ch: 对对对，你说的对，我跑不了，这下可以信我了吧？
t_en: Yes, yes, you're right. I can't escape. Do you trust me now?

t_ch: 我、我认为我们还是可以听听浮烟的计划，毕竟现在也没有什么别的办法，哎……
t_en: I—I guess we can go with Cirrus's plan. It's not like we have any of our own...

t_ch: 如何，考虑清楚了？
t_en: Have you made up your mind?

t_ch: 听听浮烟的计划。
t_en: Let's listen to Cirrus's plan.

t_ch: 走吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 等等，我再仔细考虑一下。
t_en: Wait, let me think about it.

t_ch: 明白了，等汝考虑清楚。
t_en: I understand. Take your time.

t_ch: 各位都知道大岁阳「燎原」激战将军的故事，它是众多岁阳融聚一体的结果。
t_en: You've heard the story of Ignamar and the great heliobus's glorious fight against the general. They were an entity born of many heliobi fusing together...

t_ch: 不过，咱们岁阳各自沾染着附身宿主时获得的情绪和欲望，彼此互相嫌弃，没有谁愿意和谁融在一起——就像一个人脑袋里有「多重人格」，时不时得打架。
t_en: ...but heliobi are gradually tainted by the emotions and desires of those we possess. We tend to spite each other and don't like to fuse together — it's like having multiple personalities inside a single head. It leads to "infighting..."

t_ch: 强大的岁阳也许能吞下弱小的岁阳，让它们暂时屈从成为一体——比如「燎原」，或者咱们要对付的这个「恚炎」。
t_en: A powerful heliobus like Ignamar or Furynox might be able to swallow a lesser heliobus and placate them for a while...

t_ch: 不过一遇外力刺激，这种平衡也很容易崩溃。这不，「燎原」就在与将军大战后成了咱们。
t_en: ...but this internal balance is easily broken when exposed to external forces — just like how we were torn apart and reborn after Ignamar fought the general.

t_ch: 所以，诱使恚炎崩溃…这个方法也许可行。趁着恚炎分裂，力量削弱，十王司可以用法器将它的碎片挨个封印起来。
t_en: Therefore... this might be the way to defeat Furynox. We can cause them to break apart and reduce their power, then the Ten-Lords Commission can use their sacred vessels to seal up all of Furynox's fragments.

t_ch: 但是，汝为什么要背叛同族？为什么要帮助镇伏汝等的仙舟？
t_en: I have a question. Why are you betraying your own kin? Why would you help the Xianzhou when we have sealed you for so long?

t_ch: 理由？岁阳行事一定需要什么理由吗？也许是因为我不想让恚炎吞掉自己，也许是我瞧不上这个只会使用蛮力的傻大个，也许是我想和将军一斗……
t_en: Why? Must heliobi always have a reason for their behavior? Perhaps I don't want Furynox to devour me. Perhaps I dislike idiots who use force and nothing else. Perhaps I wish to fight the general myself...

t_ch: 又也许，我想和十王司交换一个「放我离开」的承诺？
t_en: ...or maybe I just want to do a favor for the Ten-Lords Commission that will ensure I can leave here in one piece?

t_ch: 答应浮烟吧。
t_en: We should allow Cirrus to go ahead with their plan.

t_ch: 不要相信它！
t_en: Don't believe Cirrus!

t_ch: 十王司的判官绝不空许承诺。若能化解眼前危机，吾可以上禀十王，还汝自由。但结果，吾不保证。
t_en: Judges of the Ten-Lords Commission always keep our promises. If you can truly deal with the problem at hand, I will ask for your freedom from the Ten Lords. However, I cannot guarantee the outcome of the appeal.

t_ch: 哎哟，真是个死脑筋。那么今天就只好吃亏一点，做一趟货到付款的买卖了。偃偶，要守信喔。
t_en: How conventional. Fine, I accept... but you better keep your promise, puppet.

t_ch: 呵呵，我与恚炎同为关在洪炉中的狱友，彼此知根知底。它力量虽强，但心思却比孩子还幼稚，一味执着于「胜负」。我只需要三句话，管教它不攻自破。
t_en: Hehe, me and Furynox were "furnacemates..." I know them well. They are powerful, but as naive as a child and obsessed with victory. I only need to say three things to incite them.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我要继续借你的身体一用。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I'll need your body for a while longer.

t_ch: 恚炎！恚炎——！
t_en: Furynox! Furynox...!

t_ch: *远处传来若有若无的回应*
t_en: *There is a vague sound from far away. A response, possibly.*

t_ch: 与将军的决斗还早，你我先一决胜负如何？
t_en: Before you duel the general, why don't you fight me?

t_ch: 你是…浮烟？小玩意，你凭什么与我争胜？
t_en: ...Cirrus? What makes you worth my time, weakling?

t_ch: 我已将园林化为阵地，教十王司的走狗成了傀儡！只等将军一来，便可重开当年那一战。为什么要在此时和同族对垒？
t_en: I've turned this garden into my territory and made the dogs of the Ten Lords my puppets! As soon as the general arrives, the heliobi will have our rematch. Why should I fight my own at this crucial moment?

t_ch: 你操使那些乌合之众又算什么能耐，不过是些臭鱼烂虾，不堪一击。
t_en: That group of amateurs you've put together? Hah. They're nothing compared to me.

t_ch: 我却不同，机缘巧合下我已夺舍了一枚绝好的棋子——一枚曾驱走过幻胧的绝好棋子！
t_en: I have already obtained the most wonderful pawn for myself — a piece that once expelled Phantylia!

t_ch: …幻胧？…幻胧！我记起来啦！我记起来啦！这么好的棋子，我也想要！
t_en: ...Phantylia? Phantylia! I remember! What a wonderful host... I want it!

t_ch: 你尽可以差遣手中的冥差来找我，若能击败我所占据的这位无名客，我就心甘情愿被你吞下，为你大战将军贡献一臂之力。你意下如何？
t_en: Then send the spiritfarers under your control to find me. If you can defeat this Nameless I'm possessing, then you can swallow me up and let my strength aid you in your fight against the general. What do you say?

t_ch: 一言为定！我和我的棋子们，这就来找你！
t_en: Deal! My pawns and I will show you no mercy!

t_ch: 瞧瞧，轻松搞定。
t_en: See? Easy-peasy.

t_ch: 啧啧，按恚炎的说法，外面的冥差们岂不是全军覆没了？真没用！
t_en: Tsk, does that mean all the spiritfarers out there have fallen? What a useless army.

t_ch: 也就是说，咱们接下来岂不是要和同袍战斗？
t_en: ...Does that mean we'll be fighting our friends...?

t_ch: 偃偶也保留着同情心吗？看起来各位是不想打败恚炎喽？在岁阳看来，这事儿简单地就像一笔买卖。管它是同族，还是同僚，只要能赢得胜利，有什么不能下手的？
t_en: Oh, do puppets feel empathy? Or do you not wish to defeat Furynox anymore? We heliobi think of such matters as business transactions. As long as something can bring us victory, we will destroy everything — even allies and kin.

t_ch: 那么，接下来有劳各位狠狠下定决心，迎战恚炎的傀儡——也就是各位的同僚啦。
t_en: Make the decision. Furynox's pawns — your companions — must be destroyed.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，藿藿，在同恚炎交战前，先拿上这个。
t_en: You two, take this before we fight Furynox.

t_ch: 这是工造司制造的法器「藏月瓠」，十王司对它做了些改动，本想用它来困住岁阳。汝等和恚炎控制的傀儡交战后，切记要将那些分裂的岁阳锁入其中。
t_en: This is the Lunaumbra Gourd, a sacred vessel made by the Artisanship Commission. The Ten-Lords Commission has made some changes to it to better suppress heliobi. After you fight the puppets controlled by Furynox, make sure you seal their heliobi fragments in here.

t_ch: 还有……
t_en: Also...

t_ch: 我会保护好藿藿的。
t_en: I'll look after Huohuo.

t_ch: 她成为判官未久，仍需历练。除此之外，那些落入恚炎掌控的冥差，也请手下留情。
t_en: Her time as a judge has been brief — she is still inexperienced. Apart from that, please also have mercy on the spiritfarers that have fallen under Furynox's control.

t_ch: 我会对那些冥差手下留情的。
t_en: I'll go easy on the spiritfarers.

t_ch: 今日善举，十王定当感念。拜托了。
t_en: The Ten Lords will not forget your acts of kindness. Thank you.

t_ch: 尾巴大爷，接下来咱们要一起面对很危险的敌人，请你也助我一臂之力吧。
t_en: Mr. Tail, we're gonna fight some really dangerous enemies now. Please lend me your strength, too.

t_ch: 哦～没想到你说起狠话的样子还挺有模有样的嘛。
t_en: Oh-ho? Sounds like someone finally learned to talk tough.

t_ch: 要是两条腿没有抖得这么厉害，我就信了！
t_en: I would've believed you if your legs weren't shaking so much!

t_ch: 请、请不要揭穿我！我也是…好不容易才鼓起这一点点勇气的！身为判官，这一路上没帮上什么忙，净躲在{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}的背后了……
t_en: Don't point that out! It took me a lot of effort to be this brave! All this time I've just been hiding behind {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. I'm such a bad judge...

t_ch: 雪衣大人说，被岁阳占据的人不会被夺舍第二次。眼下也只有我能帮到大家了！
t_en: Madam Xueyi said those possessed by a heliobus can't get possessed again... I'm the only person who can help everyone!

t_ch: 啊呀呀，大爷我感觉自己像是个被充上气的气球，被这小怂包给吹胀了啊！还等什么呢，走吧？
t_en: Exactly! You're welcome, by the way... So, what are we waiting for? Let's go!

t_ch: 藿藿，虽是机巧身躯，吾心里也曾闪过一丝畏惧。
t_en: Huohuo, though I am of ingenium body, I too am feeling a sliver of fear.

t_ch: 雪衣大人也会害怕吗？
t_en: Madam Xueyi... you're afraid too?

t_ch: 面对能信手操纵生命的妖物，吾害怕…再也无法与妹妹共事。
t_en: Faced with a demon that can manipulate life at will, of course I'm afraid... Afraid that I won't ever work with my sister again.

t_ch: 藿藿，我也会害怕。
t_en: Huohuo, I'm afraid too.

t_ch: 连你们两位都说自己会害怕，我…我心里居然松了一口气。
t_en: ...I—I guess if even you two are afraid, then... I—I feel a little better now.

t_ch: 怕归怕，还是得揍他丫！
t_en: Afraid or not, we're still gonna beat the heck out of it!

t_ch: 走吧！接下来吾要和各位分头行动，击破被恚炎附身的傀儡。在这蠢笨岁阳回过神来之前，将「藏月瓠」中岁阳尽数镇压。
t_en: Let's go! I will find my own way to defeat the pawns possessed by Furynox... and before that foolish heliobus has realized what's happening, I will suppress all of their fragments within the Lunaumbra Gourd.

t_ch: …也就是说，要启用「束形却邪阵」？
t_en: ...So we'll need to activate the Evil Binding Matrix, right?

t_ch: 一旦完成，吾等在青丘台汇合，就在「束形却邪阵」阵心启用法阵。
t_en: Once my task is done, I will meet you at the Verdantia Terrace and activate the Evil Binding Matrix at its matrix core.

t_ch: 明白。
t_en: Okay.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！藿藿！谢天谢地，你们平安无事，真是太好啦！
t_en: {NICKNAME}! Huohuo! I'm so glad you're okay!

t_ch: 吾已将遭到恚炎摆弄的冥差尽数打倒了…既要留力，又要能击倒他们，还真是麻烦。
t_en: I have defeated all the spiritfarers controlled by Furynox... It was quite troublesome taking them down without doing any harm.

t_ch: 汝等的差事办得如何？
t_en: How goes your task?

t_ch: 嗯，恚炎的碎片已经封印的差不多了。
t_en: We're doing well. We've sealed most of Furynox's fragments.

t_ch: 接下来，该是将藏月瓠里吸入的碎片封进「束形却邪阵」里。恚炎的力量被剥离，它便无法再对绥园里的人和事施加影响了。
t_en: Now, we shall seal the fragments absorbed by the Lunaumbra Gourd into the Evil Binding Matrix. Once Furynox's power has been stripped, it will no longer be able to influence reality in Fyxestroll Garden.

t_ch: 这个葫芦，好漂亮哇，这就是仙舟上的法宝吗？
t_en: This gourd is so pretty! Is this what they call a "sacred vessel" on the Xianzhou?

t_ch: 桂乃芬小姐，请小心…靠法阵太近，可能会让人有些头晕目眩呢……
t_en: Miss Guinaifen, please be careful... You might feel dizzy if you get too close to the matrix...

t_ch: 不打紧、不打紧，毕竟我也是第一次这么近观看十王司的除魔道具呢！
t_en: It's okay. It's okay. This is my first time seeing the Ten-Lords Commission's exorcising tools up close~

t_ch: 藿藿，别让她靠近！
t_en: Huohuo, get her away from here!

t_ch: ——不好！
t_en: Oh no!

t_ch: 浮烟～是浮烟～你赢了～你赢了……
t_en: Cirrus~ It's Cirrus~ You won~ You won...

t_ch: 别抛下我们…帮帮我们～带我们一起～重现「燎原」的威光吧～
t_en: Don't leave us... help us... take us... to restore Ignamar's glory together!

t_ch: 呵呵呵，哈哈哈～
t_en: Muahahahaha⁓

t_ch: 感谢各位判官大人替我扫清障碍，收集来岁阳碎片。
t_en: Thank you, Your Honors, for helping me clear so many obstacles and collect so many heliobus fragments.

t_ch: 我说过我会从你身体里离开的，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I told you I'd leave your body, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 一场意料之外的「岁阳之祸」，化作了漫天火雨。浮烟趁乱附身于冥差，被十王司及时控制。但是尾巴的下落，已经是无处可寻……
t_en: The unanticipated turmoil of the Heliobi Disaster turned in a rain of fire. Cirrus grasped the chance to possess a spiritfarer, only for the Ten-Lords Commission to subdue it. Tail, however, is nowhere to be seen...

t_ch: 尾巴，尾巴……
t_en: Tail... Mr. Tail...

t_ch: 尾巴…怎么了？
t_en: What happened to Tail...?

t_ch: 尾巴干扰了浮烟，是他帮了咱们…但是…但是他却不在了……
t_en: Tail distracted Cirrus... He helped us so much... B—But now he's gone...

t_ch: 我哪儿也感应不到他…他不在了。
t_en: I can't sense him anywhere... He's gone.

t_ch: 藿藿…
t_en: Huohuo...

t_ch: …我真的是判官吗？
t_en: What kind of judge am I...

t_ch: 要是我能再有用一些，尾巴就不至于牺牲自己……
t_en: If I were stronger, Mr. Tail wouldn't have had to sacrifice himself...

t_ch: 虽然因为尾巴，我一直干着难熬的工作，过着苦哈哈的日子……
t_en: It was because of him that I ended up in this terrible job...

t_ch: 有无数次想过要是没有这家伙，自己现在过的该有多舒坦啊，可是…可是真到了离开他的时刻…我…我心里却空落落的。
t_en: ...and I've thought so much about how much better my life would be if I never met him... but now that he's actually gone... I feel so empty inside...

t_ch: 我果然是个不争气的人，自己期待已久的事情发生了，却一点也笑不出来。
t_en: I really am useless... I've been looking forward to this day for so long, but now that it's here... I don't feel happy at all.

t_ch: 岁阳是不会就这样被消灭的。
t_en: Heliobi don't die that easily.

t_ch: 雪衣大人说，岁阳是不灭的火焰，尾巴大爷他…肯定就在某处。
t_en: Wait, you're right... Madam Xueyi said that heliobi are eternal flames that will never burn away. Mr. Tail... He must still be out there somewhere.

t_ch: 他自由了。
t_en: He's free now.

t_ch: 是啊，他自由了。
t_en: ...I guess he is...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}不用担心我。藿藿没事，我还得振作起来，继续执行任务呢。
t_en: Don't worry, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... I'm okay. I need to pull myself together and finish the job...

t_ch: …谢谢你，藿藿已经好多了。现在得麻烦你去向素裳小姐解释解释，好让她放下心来。
t_en: ...Thank you. I'm much better now. Could you please let Miss Sushang know what happened...? She'll be relieved.

t_ch: 附身藿藿的那家伙…似乎消失了。吾不知道该替藿藿高兴还是难过……
t_en: The one possessing Huohuo... seems to have disappeared. I don't know if I should be happy or sad for her...

t_ch: 算了，情感思考一向非吾所长。
t_en: Never mind. I've never been good at figuring out emotions.

t_ch: 感谢出手相助，无名客。十王司的增援很快会来，桂乃芬也会被送去医馆看护的。
t_en: Thank you for your assistance, Nameless. Reinforcements from the Ten-Lords Commission will be here soon, and Guinaifen will be sent to an apothecary.

t_ch: 你的身体故障似乎很严重。
t_en: Your body seems to be severely malfunctioning.

t_ch: 机巧假身，更换轻而易举，不必在意。
t_en: It is only an artificial ingenium body. I can swap into another one easily. Do not worry.

t_ch: 好像没有找到寒鸦判官…
t_en: I don't see Judge Hanya anywhere...

t_ch: …汝等离开后，寒鸦回十王司复命；如今她正带着增援赶来。
t_en: Hanya returned to the Ten-Lords Commission after you left. She is coming with the reinforcements as we speak.

t_ch: 浮烟挂了吗？
t_en: Is Cirrus dead?

t_ch: 不，这邪物尚在，还劫持了吾麾下的冥差童子。身为星火之精，岁阳不会死灭，十王司缚魔典籍中的记载果然是真的。
t_en: No. The demon lives on. They even possessed a young spiritfarer under my command. "As Starfire Essences, the heliobi will never die" — the records in the Ten-Lords Commission's evil-binding tomes were all real...

t_ch: 不过，这厮失去了它敛聚的大部分力量，暂时不足为惧。可它一日存在，就有一日的隐患……
t_en: Cirrus lost most of their power and poses no danger for the time being. But they will remain a threat for as long as they exist...

t_ch: 所幸十王司已备妥了镇伏岁阳的法器，届时将以此处废园结成阵法，囚缚岁阳。今日的仙舟，算是渡过一劫了。
t_en: Thankfully, the Ten-Lords Commission had prepared other sacred vessels to suppress the heliobi. We will construct a matrix all over this abandoned garden and seal the heliobi within. The Xianzhou will live to see another day.

t_ch: 接下来就交给十王司吧，吾…也想好好休息一番了。
t_en: We can leave the rest to the Ten-Lords Commission from here... Even I feel like I need a rest.

t_ch: 接下来就交给十王司吧，吾…也想好好休息一番了。
t_en: We can leave the rest to the Ten-Lords Commission from here... Even I feel like I need a rest.

t_ch: ……呃啊啊啊啊，你们休想把我砌进法阵里！
t_en: ...Grahhhh, don't even think about sealing me in the matrix!

t_ch: 混蛋，混蛋混蛋混蛋！尾巴、你、还有那些判官，总有一天…
t_en: You wretched fools! Tail, the judges, you... One day...

t_ch: 总有一天我会找到机会，将你们撕得粉碎，将你们骨头咬得嘎吱作响，抽干你们每一分力气，再把你们像痰一般唾进地缝里……
t_en: ...one day, sooner or later, I'll tear you all to pieces. I'll crunch your bones to dust, sap every drop of your strength, and spit you out into the dirt where you belong...

t_ch: …浮烟？
t_en: ...Cirrus?

t_ch: 这么快就认不出老朋友了？
t_en: Already forgetting me?

t_ch: 想不想回{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}怀里？
t_en: Wanna hug, sweety?

t_ch: 论恶毒，人类比起岁阳真是丝毫不逊色。
t_en: Tsk, your human tongues are no less poisonous than ours.

t_ch: 好好改造吧。
t_en: I hope you repent.

t_ch: 岁阳只会被判处一种刑罚，永远关押。他们杀不死我，却也不可能放走我。
t_en: Heliobi are faced with only a single punishment — eternal imprisonment. They can lock me up, but they can't kill me.

t_ch: 离开这个孩子。
t_en: Leave the kid alone.

t_ch: 孩子？身为冥差，他经历的人生要比你多的多。
t_en: Kid? As a spiritfarer, he's already experienced more than you could in a lifetime.

t_ch: 只要我一天被困在此处，我就不会离开他的肉身。判官们尽可以给这具身体贴上神咒，涂抹符水，没关系，只要十王司还想保住属僚的性命，我就有讨价还价的余地。
t_en: For as long as I'm sealed in the matrix, I will inhabit this body. The judges can stick as many talismans and pour as much enchanted water on this flesh as they like — I don't care. As long as they want to save their own, I still have a bargaining chip.

t_ch: 现在你还能玩出什么花样来？
t_en: What tricks can you possibly pull as you are now?

t_ch: 我能做的还有很多，{NICKNAME}，我会一直存在。
t_en: There are many, {NICKNAME}... I will exist forever.

t_ch: 联盟成立前，我已活了无数岁月，联盟消逝后，我仍将存在无数个琥珀纪。
t_en: I have lived for countless years. I existed before the Alliance was even an idea. And once the Alliance has turned to dust, I will continue to exist for countless more Amber Eras.

t_ch: 我能等待，等你们松懈，等绥园的阵法崩毁。时间和机会永远站在我这儿。
t_en: I can wait. I'll wait for humans to let their guard down. I'll wait till the matrix drawn over Fyxestroll Garden collapses. Time and opportunity will always be on my side.

t_ch: 再见。
t_en: Goodbye.

t_ch: 是啊，咱们会再见面的。
t_en: ...We will meet again.

t_ch: 除了绥园里咱们几个，造化洪炉破碎时，还有其他岁阳逃逸无踪。他们如今何在？又会在罗浮各处掀起什么水花来？
t_en: I wasn't the only heliobus to escape when the Creation Furnace was destroyed... there are more of us than the mere few in Fyxestroll Garden. Where are they now? And what will they do to the Luofu?

t_ch: 我很期待十王司手忙脚乱的样子。
t_en: I look forward to seeing how the Ten-Lords Commission responds in the coming days...

t_ch: 浮烟直直盯着你，不再说话，阴鸷和谋算在他的双眼中闪过。
t_en: Cirrus stares at you in silence, and you can tell from their eyes that they are conspiring.

t_ch: 浮烟直直盯着你，不再说话，阴鸷和谋算在他的双眼中闪过。
t_en: Cirrus stares at you in silence, and you can tell from their eyes that they are conspiring.

t_ch: 幽幽的门扇静谧无声，你效仿话本的做法，叩击门钹左边三次，右边三次。
t_en: The gloomy doors are silent. You follow the instruction in the book and knock on the doors, three times on the left, three times on the right.

t_ch: 礼数未至，不可开门，客人请回吧。
t_en: The door will not open without the proper courtesies. Return from where you came, visitors...

t_ch: 周遭一切如同无事发生，恢复如初。
t_en: Everything returns to normal.

t_ch: 幽幽的门扇静谧无声，你效仿话本的做法，叩击门钹左边三次，右边三次。
t_en: The gloomy doors are silent. You follow the instruction in the book and knock on the doors, three times on the left, three times on the right.

t_ch: 礼数齐备，客人请进吧。
t_en: The courtesies have been performed. Enter, oh honored guest.

t_ch: 门扇轻轻打开，透过门缝，你注意到门后并无一人，之前的声音就像不曾存在过一般。
t_en: The door cracks open a sliver. Through the crack, you notice that there is no one behind the door, as if the voice from before have never existed.

t_ch: 停，我知道你想问什么。欺负小姑娘有意思，另外，我没有解除附身——省省力气吧。
t_en: I know what you want to ask. Yes, it does amuse me to make a little girl cry, and no, I haven't left your body. There, now you can save your breath.

t_ch: 还盯着我干什么，去安慰下那个玻璃心小姑娘吧。
t_en: What are you staring at? Go. Say something nice to the girl.

t_ch: 呜哇啊啊啊啊！那边的门自己打开了。
t_en: Wahhhh! That door just opened on its own!

t_en: This illusion is shifting.

t_en: You're right, {M#boy}{F#girl}. This place is changing. It's trying to stop us from escaping.

t_en: But one of these mirrors must contain the exit, right? Let's check them all...

t_ch: 我们去调查别的镜子吧。

t_en: But...

t_en: I see. Do not be afraid. Huohuo knows me well — she will be able to discern me from the counterfeits.

t_ch: 可我要是分辨不出，该怎么办？

t_ch: 此时此刻，唯有相信自己，来吧。

t_ch: 穿过铜镜。

t_ch: 去调查其他铜镜。

t_ch: 可是……
t_en: But...

t_ch: 藿藿为什么能当十王司判官？

t_ch: 闭嘴吧你。
t_en: Tsk, very funny...

t_ch: 白痴，这家伙当然是在骗人啊。

t_ch: 那个人偶判官从来就没有高看老子一眼，但也没有放松警惕。
t_en: That puppet judge never respected me, but she also never let her guard down.

t_ch: 我和雪衣大人相处了很久，她一直都了解我胆小怕事，但是却从未苛责过我。
t_en: I've spent a long time working with Madam Xueyi. She's always known that I'm scared and timid, but she never told me off...

t_ch: 嘁，十王司根本就不在乎，只有你自己在意得很。

t_ch: 只要别拖老子后腿，你想怎么胆小就怎么胆小，老子也不在乎。

t_ch: 尾～巴——

t_ch: 别别别，一边去。

t_ch: 其实你们两个关系还挺好的…

t_ch: 呜哇啊啊～我我我、我能不能趴着过去……

t_ch: 嘁，给老子支楞起来啊。

t_ch: 没想到你这姑娘竟然真的能通过这条道路，呵呵，这么多年了，终于算是有所成长。
t_en: Ha, I didn't think you'd be able to, hehe. All these years and you finally started to grow up a bit.

t_ch: 藿藿，动身吧，这应该是最后的铜镜了。
t_en: Hurry, Huohuo. This should be the last mirror.

t_ch: …虽然，我不想再走回头路，但是咱们还得问些与藿藿有关的问题，确认一下！
t_en: ...I don't wanna go back the way we came, but I need to ask some questions about myself to make sure!

t_ch: 你觉得藿藿性格怎么样？

t_ch: 人各有秉性，担任判官不同于从军上阵，要的不只是一腔血勇。
t_en: Everyone is different. A judge is not a soldier, and they need more than just courage.

t_en: It is the decree of the Ten Lords for Huohuo to be elevated to a judge. There must be some meaning in it.

t_ch: …那些老怪物到底看上这个怂包哪一点了？

t_ch: 你如何看待藿藿的尾巴？
t_en: What do you think about Huohuo's tail?

t_ch: 被封印的岁阳，奉行十王旨意的工具罢了。
t_en: It is merely a sealed heliobus, a tool carrying out the will of the Ten Lords.

t_ch: 虽然火大，她确实是这么看待老子的。
t_en: Hmph. I may not like it, but that is how she sees me.

t_ch: …走吧，就是这面镜子了。
t_en: ...Let's go. This is the right mirror.

t_ch: 放心交给我吧，姐姐。
t_en: As I said, sister, I will handle this.

t_ch: 此地不宜久留，请即刻离开。
t_en: This place is dangerous. You should leave at once.

t_ch: 这绥园中异象频出，十王司也无法保护你们周全，我劝二位趁早离开。
t_en: Fyxestroll Garden is full of abnormalities — even the Ten-Lords Commission cannot guarantee your safety. I suggest you leave immediately.

t_ch: 这周围的气氛是不是不太对…我好害怕，你离我近一些，我怕你也不见了……
t_en: Is it me or is this place starting to feel weirder and weirder...? I'm scared... Can you stay close to me? I don't want to lose you, too...

t_ch: 怕啥，这不是正巧吗？走，我们进去看看。
t_en: Less screaming, more thinking — this is an opportunity, is it not? Let's go in and check it out.

t_ch: 这…声音…藿藿…来这边。
t_en: That... sound... Huohuo... this way.

t_ch: …我有一样东西要交给你们两位，请到这边来。
t_en: ...Please come over here. I need to give you something.

t_ch: （…不知道藿藿怎么样了，去问问吧。）
t_en: (I wonder how Huohuo is doing... I should check up on her.)

t_ch: 对了，十王司联系了桂乃芬小姐的朋友素裳。我现在走不开，只好麻烦你去向素裳小姐解释解释，好让她放下心来。
t_en: Oh, the Ten-Lords Commission contacted Miss Guinaifen's friend — Miss Sushang. I can't leave my post, so... could you let Miss Sushang know what happened...? She'll be relieved.

t_ch: 事情的大致，我已经在医馆里听小桂子讲过了。方便的话，能麻烦你再给我讲讲吗？
t_en: Little Gui kinda gave me an outline of what happened in the apothecary... Can you tell me more?

t_ch: 你解释了绥园中发生的大小事情。素裳似乎明白了事态严重性……
t_en: You explain what happened in Fyxestroll Garden to Sushang, and she seems to realize the seriousness of the situation...

t_ch: 谢谢你告诉我这么多，我也没想到事情会发展到这一步……
t_en: Thanks for telling me everything. I didn't think things would get so out of hand...

t_ch: 要是我也在绥园里就能帮上你们了，说不定小桂子也不必住进医馆…哎。

t_ch: 对了，你不必担心小桂子，她在病床上也不安生，也许过不了多久就来联系你了。

t_ch: 我正打算再去医馆看看她，我们就此别过吧。
t_en: I'm heading to the apothecary to check up on her. Catch you later.

t_ch: 桂乃芬面不改色地将葫芦摔到地上，葫芦在地上碎开，无数的岁阳逃了出来。

t_ch: 随即，桂乃芬也晕倒过去。
t_en: She faints right after.

t_ch: 守住谈狐林入口的幽府武弁本想阻止你离开，但是她们忍住了。
t_en: The Wraith Wardens who guard the Locufox Forest entrance wanted to prevent you from leaving, but they held themselves back.

t_ch: 想必她们已经意识到了，你和你手里的球棒从来不惧怕任何的幽灵鬼怪——即便横加阻拦也是徒劳，没人能挡住你，毕竟你还有界域定锚。
t_en: They must have realized that you and the bat in your hands have never feared any ghosts or spirits. Any form of hindrance would be a waste of time. No one can stop you — you have access to the Space Anchor, after all.

t_ch: 但是，{RUBY_B#共犯}你的新朋友{RUBY_E#}桂乃芬还在等你，你还是听雪衣的话，让藿藿带你们离开吧。
t_en: However, {RUBY_B#partner in crime}your new friend{RUBY_E#} Guinaifen is still waiting for you. You should listen to Xueyi and let Huohuo take you two out of here.

t_ch: 贵客，欢迎光临！我是这里的店长柯柯娜，请问您有什么需要的吗？
t_en: Welcome, guest! I'm the shop owner here, Cocona. How may I assist you?

t_ch: 她微笑地看着你，那笑容显然经过经年累月的训练——多一分则谄媚，少一分则冷漠。
t_en: She smiles at you, with a precise smile obviously honed from years of training — a mere notch more would be flattery, and a notch less would be indifferent.

t_ch: 令你尤其在意的是她的声音：清澈、明亮，但藏着一丝疲惫——也许她每天都要对无数个客人重复一样的说辞吧。
t_en: What particularly captures your attention is her voice: Limpid, bright, but with a hidden tinge of fatigue — perhaps she has to repeat this umpteenth times to umpteenth customers every day.

t_ch: 珠宝，腕表，包袋，高级定制…您可以在这里买到匹诺康尼最高端和最奢侈的商品。
t_en: Jewelry, wristwatches, handbags, and haute couture... You can find the most high-end and opulent merchandise in Penacony here.

t_ch: 想看看具体的商品。
t_en: I'd like to peruse your goods.

t_ch: 好的，我可以先为您大体介绍一下。
t_en: Of course, allow me to give you a general introduction first.

t_ch: 好像来错了地方。
t_en: I think I came to the wrong place.

t_ch: 没关系，多了解并不是坏事。
t_en: That's fine. No harm in learning more.

t_ch: 如果我猜的没错，您是第一次来到匹诺康尼的逐梦客吧…在匹诺康尼玩得开心吗？
t_en: If I'm not wrong, you're a first-time Dreamchaser in Penacony... Are you having fun here?

t_ch: 嗯，玩得很开心。
t_en: Yes I am.

t_ch: 那就好。除了「黄金的时刻」，我也推荐您去往其他的时刻游览…别处的风景也别有一番滋味。
t_en: That's good. Besides the Golden Hour, I'd also recommend you touring the other Moments... The sights in other places are all uniquely breathtaking in their own right.

t_ch: 还没好好玩一遍。
t_en: I haven't tried everything yet

t_ch: 「黄金的时刻」是匹诺康尼最奢华的一处梦境，集中了全银河的各种珍宝，值得好好逛逛。
t_en: The Golden Hour is Penacony's most grandiose Dreamscape, brimming with the cosmos's myriad treasures. It's worth spending some time in.

t_ch: 年轻真好啊。看到您，我就想起了我还是学生的那段岁月——作为匹诺康尼本地人，那时的我连一句话都不敢多说…一步都不敢走错。
t_en: It's nice being young. Seeing you reminds me of the times when I was still a student. Back then, as a native of Penacony, I dared not utter a wrong word more... nor take a wrong step.

t_ch: …抱歉，突然说了些莫名其妙的话…我想到有几件服饰挺适合您的，想看看吗？
t_en: ...Apologies for suddenly spouting such strange words... I have a few outfits that I think would be perfect for you. Would you care to take a look?

t_ch: 好的衣服就像知己。您还年轻，总有一天会与它们相遇，不如提前了解一下。
t_en: Fitting clothes are like bosom friends. You're still young, and you'll encounter them eventually, so why not get to know them beforehand?

t_ch: 看看这件灰色的大衣。
t_en: I'd like to take a look at this gray overcoat.

t_ch: 这件大衣需要五十个梦境织工耗费三十个系统时的时间织成，相比那些速成的产品，它拥有令人难以置信的细节。
t_en: This overcoat took fifty Dreamscape weavers thirty system hours to thread together. Other mass-manufactured products pale in comparison to its astounding artistic details.

t_ch: 它的原料取自…取自忆域古老的材料。整体的风格潇洒而优雅，十分适合重要场合穿着。
t_en: It is made from... from ancient materials harvested from the Memory Zone. The overall style is chic, yet elegant — perfect for important occasions.

t_ch: 看看这双黑色的靴子。
t_en: I'd like to take a look at this pair of black boots.

t_ch: 这双靴子的原料来自于域外星球，需要八十个梦境织工耗费大量的精神力进行鞣制和裁剪才能制成。
t_en: These boots' materials hail from an outer planet, requiring the colossal mental efforts of eighty Dreamscape weavers in the tanning and tailoring process.

t_ch: 采集这些原料的过程十分危险，故而这款皮靴当季限量发售…呃…两百，不…三百双，本店也只剩下最后三双了。
t_en: The journey to harvest these materials was highly dangerous — the very reason that only... err... two hundred, no... three hundred pairs of this limited design were sold this season. And our shop only has three pairs left.

t_ch: 看看这条白色的裤子。
t_en: I'd like to take a look at these white pants.

t_ch: 这条长裤的款式由著名设计师…坤德先生首创，尤其值得介绍的是其上的刺绣，它的灵感来自于某位著名画家，由金线穿织而成。
t_en: These pants are an avant-garde creation by the renowned designer... Mr. Kunde. Special mention has to be made of its embroidery — its inspiration originates from a certain famous painter, and is woven with gold threads.

t_ch: 就这样吧。
t_en: That's all.

t_ch: （怎么感觉有点磕磕绊绊的……）
t_en: (Why does it feel a bit forced...)

t_ch: 这里有最新的一期《美梦华服》杂志，您可以在里面了解更多的信息。
t_en: This is the latest issue of Dream Couture. You can learn more about the fashion items in this magazine.

t_ch: 柯柯娜将一本杂志递给了你，她闭上眼睛，皱着眉头，身躯微微摇晃，好像不太舒服。
t_en: As Cocona passes you a magazine, she shuts her eyes, a frown creasing her brow, and her body wavers slightly. Could she be unwell?

t_ch: 你拿起了《美梦华服》翻看。琳琅的商品在你面前流动着，直到一张便条掉了下来。
t_en: You pick up Dream Couture and flip through it, your eyes perusing the stream of its dazzling catalog, until a note falls out from between its pages.

t_ch: （诶，这是什么东西？）
t_en: (Hmm, what's this?)

t_ch: …嘀嗒！快过来！快过来！
t_en: ...Tick tock! Over here! Quickly!

t_ch: 欢迎光…欸？您是刚刚那位客人吗……
t_en: Welco... Eh? Are you the customer from just now...?

t_ch: 柯柯娜略带茫然地看着你——明明你们不久之前还交谈过。
t_en: Cocona looks a tad lost at the sight of you — but you two just chatted a few moments ago.

t_ch: 柯柯娜小姐，你还好吗？
t_en: Miss Cocona, are you feeling all right?

t_ch: 抱歉，我最近可能有些太累了…那个，请问您有什么需要的吗？
t_en: Sorry, I've been a bit tired recently... So, how may I assist you?

t_ch: 你好像很累…快去休息吧。
t_en: You look pretty tired... You should take a break.

t_ch: 不好意思…给您带来不好的体验了。
t_en: I'm sorry... for providing you with an unsatisfactory shopping experience.

t_ch: 嘀嗒！刚才和你说话的人，感觉不太对劲。
t_en: Tick-tock! Something's not quite right about the person you just spoke to.

t_ch: 我也感觉到了……
t_en: I feel it too...

t_ch: 她好像很累……
t_en: She looks really tired...

t_ch: 那位声音很好听的女士，她的身上好像缺了某样东西——你也看到她写的了吧？她觉得心里很空洞，好像把什么很重要的东西忘记了。
t_en: That lady with the nice voice... she's lacking something in her. You saw what she wrote too, right? She thinks there's a void in her heart, like she forgot something really important.

t_ch: 估计她心里也缺失了某个部分…{NICKNAME}，我们去帮她找回完整的自己吧！
t_en: I reckon she's lost some part of her heart... {NICKNAME}, we must help make her whole again!

t_ch: 是您啊…刚才给您带来了不好的体验。十分抱歉。
t_en: Ooh, it's you... My sincere apologies for the subpar experience just now.

t_ch: 请问您还有什么需要吗？
t_en: How may I assist you?

t_ch: 开始「钟表把戏」
t_en: Start the Clockwork

t_ch: 没事，您先休息一会吧。
t_en: It's fine. Please take a break first.

t_ch: 「悲伤」如同水流一般进入了柯柯娜的内心，芜杂的记忆和过去像汹涌的潮水一样将柯柯娜淹没。
t_en: "Sorrow" streams into Cocona's heart like a stinging surge, jumbled memories and past drowning her like a turbulent tide.

t_ch: 原来…我经历的是这样的生活吗……
t_en: So... this is the life I live...?

t_ch: 真是没有意义…真是没有价值……
t_en: So meaningless... So worthless...

t_ch: 柯柯娜小姐，您还好吗？
t_en: Miss Cocona, are you all right?

t_ch: 没…没关系的……
t_en: It's... It's fine...

t_ch: 柯柯娜用手紧紧地抓着自己的衣服，她开始微微地发抖。
t_en: Cocona tightly clutches her clothes, and her body starts to shiver.

t_ch: （柯柯娜小姐的状态很不好…为什么会变成这样？）
t_en: (Miss Cocona doesn't look too good... Why is this happening?)

t_ch: 能听见我讲话吗？
t_en: Can you hear me?

t_ch: 深呼吸，深呼吸，柯柯娜，现在是工作时间，你必须打起精神来…等到醒来，等到醒来就好了……
t_en: Deep breaths, Cocona, deep breaths. It's working hours now. You've got to get it together... When you wake up, when you wake up, it'll all be fine...

t_ch: 就像之前一样，深呼吸，深呼吸…不要流泪…
t_en: Just like before, deep breaths, deep breaths... Don't cry...

t_ch: 只要挺过这一段时间就好了……
t_en: You just have to get through this...

t_ch: （情况好像有点失控了……）
t_en: (The situation seems to be getting out of control...)

t_ch: 我马上去找护理师！
t_en: I'll go get the dream nurse right now!

t_ch: 等到天边的光芒出现…等到……
t_en: Just got to wait till the light appears over the horizon... Till then...

t_ch: 深呼吸，深呼吸，柯柯娜，现在是工作时间，你必须打起精神来…等到醒来，等到醒来就好了……
t_en: Deep breaths, Cocona, deep breaths. It's working hours now. You've got to get it together... When you wake up, when you wake up, it'll all be fine...

t_ch: 就像之前一样，深呼吸，深呼吸…不要流泪…
t_en: Just like before, deep breaths, deep breaths... Don't cry...

t_ch: 只要挺过这一段时间就好了……
t_en: You just have to get through this...

t_ch: （糟糕，情况有点失控了……）
t_en: (Uh-oh, the situation's getting out of control...)

t_ch: 挺住，柯柯娜小姐——
t_en: Hang in there, Miss Cocona —

t_ch: ——我马上去找护理师！
t_en: I'll get the dream nurse right now!

t_ch: 等到天边的光芒出现…等到……
t_en: Just got to wait till the light appears over the horizon... Till then...

t_ch: 如果您刚从梦中醒来，请牢记——此处是现实。
t_en: If you've just woken up from a dream, remember — this is reality.

t_ch: 柯柯娜小姐很不舒服。
t_en: Miss Cocona's not feeling well.

t_ch: 柯柯娜？噢，是那位奢侈品店的店长吧——她怎么了？
t_en: Cocona? Oh, that luxury goods shop owner... What's wrong with her?

t_ch: 她一下子变得特别沮丧。
t_en: She suddenly became very depressed.

t_ch: 常见的症状，看来还是以前的老毛病。
t_en: A common symptom. Looks like her old problem is acting up again.

t_ch: 感觉她变得有些精神恍惚。
t_en: It feels like she's become somewhat dazed.

t_ch: 啊…大概是之前的治疗带来的副作用。
t_en: Ah... probably side effects from the prior treatment.

t_ch: 我记得不久之前，她还接受过特别的「治疗」——是不是又发生了什么刺激到她的事？
t_en: I recall that she received special treatment not too long ago... Did something happen again to upset her?

t_ch: 工作体面，收入丰厚，却总是被这样的问题困扰，真令人捉摸不透。
t_en: She has a decent job and great income, but is always plagued by such problems — it really baffles me.

t_ch: 乔凡娜自顾自地处理着手上的工作，仿佛她不是第一次碰到这种情况。
t_en: Giovanna nonchalantly continues working on whatever she has on hand as if it isn't the first time she has encountered this problem.

t_ch: 柯柯娜小姐生病了吗？
t_en: Is Miss Cocona ill?

t_ch: 高强度工作会对精神造成很大的负担，或许她就是工作压力太大了吧？久而久之，情绪就会变得低落。
t_en: High-intensity work will severely burden one's mental well-being. Perhaps she's too stressed at work? Over time, that would eventually cause depression.

t_ch: 相关人员已经对她的情绪做了「处理」，她应该已经忘了那些不愉快的事。相对的，健忘、嗜睡、反应迟钝是难以避免的副作用。
t_en: The relevant personnel have already "handled" her emotions accordingly. She should have already forgotten all the unhappy memories. Conversely, forgetfulness, sleepiness, and dulled reactions are unavoidable side effects.

t_ch: 你们给她做了什么治疗？
t_en: What sort of treatment did you give her?

t_ch: 相关人员已经对她的情绪做了「处理」，她应该已经忘了那些不愉快的事。相对的，健忘、嗜睡、反应迟钝是难以避免的副作用。
t_en: The relevant personnel have already "handled" her emotions accordingly. She should have already forgotten all the unhappy memories. Conversely, forgetfulness, sleepiness, and dulled reactions are unavoidable side effects.

t_ch: 请原谅我不能对您透露太多有关「治疗」的细节，这是家族的规定。
t_en: Please forgive me for not being able to reveal too many details regarding the "treatment." It's a rule set by The Family.

t_ch: 感谢您告知我柯柯娜小姐的近况——我会派人再多给她送些「特调」。
t_en: Thank you for informing me of Miss Cocona's recent situation. I will dispatch people to deliver more of the "special drink" to her.

t_ch: 「特调」？
t_en: Special drink?

t_ch: 啊，就是一种配方十分特别的苏乐达——专门为像柯柯娜这样的人准备的，全梦境独一份的特别饮品。
t_en: Ah, it's a very special recipe of SoulGlad, specially prepared for those like Cocona — a special drink unique in the Dreamscapes.

t_ch: 只要在梦境里喝下它，她就能暂时忘记那些烦恼，并压制住那些负面情绪，正常投入工作和生活中。
t_en: Drink it within the Dreamscape and she will temporarily forget her troubles and suppress those negative emotions, allowing her to properly focus on her work and lead a normal life.

t_ch: 由我来转交吧。
t_en: Let me deliver it to her then.

t_ch: 我的动作更快。
t_en: I can deliver it quicker for you.

t_ch: 您的意思是……
t_en: You mean...

t_ch: 我明白了，那我就把「特调」交给您，由您来转交给柯柯娜女士吧。
t_en: I understand. I'll give the special drink to you then. Please deliver it to Miss Cocona.

t_ch: 您真是一位乐于助人的逐梦客——我见过许许多多、形形色色的客人，拥有您这种品质的人简直少之又少。
t_en: You're such a helpful Dreamchaser. I've met many guests from all walks of life — those with character comparable to yours are few and far between.

t_ch: 那这件事就劳烦您了。正好，我手头还有其它客人需要照顾。
t_en: I'll be troubling you with this matter then. Just as well, I have other guests to look after right now.

t_ch: 能快速结束这场对话，乔凡娜显得很开心——她转过头，接着忙她自己的事情去了。
t_en: Giovanna is visibly pleased that she can end this conversation quickly. She turns away and busies herself with her many tasks.

t_ch: 柯柯娜依然站在那里，努力微笑。细密的汗珠从她的额头上渗了出来。有些经过的客人发现了异样，在一旁指指点点。
t_en: Cocona is still standing there, trying her best to smile. Fine beads of sweat emerge on her forehead. Some passing guests notice the strangeness and start to murmur and point at her.

t_ch: 贵客，欢迎光临。我是这里的店长柯柯娜，您有什么需要吗？
t_en: Welcome, esteemed guest. I am the shop owner here, Cocona. How may I assist you?

t_ch: 柯柯娜，是我呀。
t_en: Cocona, it's me.

t_ch: 啊，是您啊…我现在已经没事了，承蒙您关照……
t_en: Ah, it's you... I'm all fine now. Thank you for your assistance...

t_ch: 之前…我只是一时受到了刺激，没想到自己居然忘了那么多的事情。您看，我现在已经完全恢复…可以正常工作营业了。
t_en: Back then... I was just momentarily shocked. I never thought I had forgotten so many things. Look, I'm all recovered... I'm able to work just like before.

t_ch: （柯柯娜小姐突然恢复正常了……）
t_en: (Miss Cocona has suddenly returned to normal...)

t_ch: （但总觉得还有什么地方不太对劲…再和她聊聊看吧。）
t_en: (But I still feel like something's off... Better chat with her some more.)

t_ch: 我带来了「心灵慰藉特调」。
t_en: I brought the Soulheal Special Mix.

t_ch: 感谢您…不过，我已经不需要那种东西了。
t_en: Thank you... but I don't need such a thing any longer.

t_ch: 我很高兴能想起之前发生的事…即便都是些不那么愉快的回忆。
t_en: I'm very happy to remember the events that happened in the past... Even if they brought back unhappy memories.

t_ch: 一切都已经过去了…以前的我会陷入踌躇，举棋不定…但是现在，我想我终于找到解决一切的办法了。
t_en: They're all bygones... I used to be trapped in my hesitation, afraid to move forward... But now, I think I've finally found a way to resolve it all.

t_ch: 我很开心，{F#女士}{M#先生}…我真的很开心。
t_en: I'm truly happy, {F#madam}{M#mister}... I really am truly happy.
